sections.name: capital_exposure
sections.summary: Validasi batas allocated/allowed + exposure pair-class/discovery dari runtime evidence.

checks.description: Pair-class limit dan discovery-bucket limit tetap dihormati

sections.name: exchange_reconciliation_resilience
sections.summary: Validasi cancel/uncertain/recovery seeded + shadow-live evidence + manual market-real boundary.

checks.description: cancelAllOrders tidak boleh memalsukan cancel order submission_uncertain tanpa exchangeOrderId
notes: Canceled 1 active orders; unresolved 1 submission-uncertain orders

checks.description: Recovery/cancel evidence harus muncul di execution summary persistence
Evidence shadow-live existing harus bisa direuse sebagai proof layer Fase 3
notes: Belum ada shadow evidence di archive. Jalankan: RUN_REAL_EXCHANGE_SHADOW=1 npm run probe:shadow-live

checks.description: Bukti market-real manual harus di-ingest untuk auth/order/reconciliation/resilience
notes: Belum ada evidence manual. Gunakan: npm run validate:phase3:market-real-check -- <json-file>

sections.name: emergency_recovery
sections.summary: Validasi emergency exit + consistency evidence summaries/outcomes.

checks.description: Emergency path harus menghasilkan execution summary persisten

checklist.description: Suite source/probe untuk capital + exchange ops + emergency harus lulus
Strict shadow-live proof harus tersedia dari evidence archive
Market-real proof harus berasal dari evidence manual exchange nyata
checklist.notes: Ingest evidence manual via npm run validate:phase3:market-real-check -- <json-file>

limitations: Source/probe proof tidak boleh disamakan dengan market-real proof.
Ruleset GitHub branch protection tetap harus diverifikasi di setting repository.
Shadow-live proof belum full-pass dari evidence archive latest run.
Market-real proof masih manual-required atau ada check manual yang gagal.

boundaryNotes.sourceProbeProof: Dibuktikan oleh validate:phase3 seeded/non-destruktif terhadap runtime path lokal.
boundaryNotes.shadowLiveProof: Dibuktikan oleh verify:shadow-live + evidence archive ShadowRunEvidence.
boundaryNotes.marketRealProof: Dibuktikan lewat evidence manual real exchange yang di-ingest, bukan dari seeded probe.
